nasb.text: They said to him, “Inquire of God, please, that we may know whether our way on which we are going will be prosperous.”

esv.text: And they said to him, “Inquire of God, please, that we may know whether the journey on which we are setting out will succeed.”

cnv.text: 他們對他說：“請你求問　神，使我們知道我們要走的道路是否順利。”

ccb.text: 他们说：“请你求问上帝，看看我们是否一路顺利。”
